It uses the Theatre.js motion engine for multi-step, choreographed animations that go well beyond Divi’s built-in entrance effects, while staying lightweight and accessible."}}},"builderVersion":"5.0.0-public-beta.9.1"} /-->
<!-- wp:divi/accordion-item {"title":{"innerContent":{"desktop":{"value":"Does DiviTheatre slow down my Divi 5 site?"}}},"content":{"innerContent":{"desktop":{"value":"No. The engine ships as a single IIFE bundle, exits as a no-op when no tagged elements are present, and drives scroll effects with requestAnimationFrame and IntersectionObserver - so there are zero scroll event listeners and no layout shift."}}},"builderVersion":"5.0.0-public-beta.9.1"} /-->
<!-- wp:divi/accordion-item {"title":{"innerContent":{"desktop":{"value":"Will DiviTheatre animations work on mobile and with reduced motion?"}}},"content":{"innerContent":{"desktop":{"value":"Yes - safely. Every preset skips on viewports under 768px and jumps to its final visible state when a visitor has prefers-reduced-motion enabled, so content is never hidden. You can override the mobile skip per element when needed."}}},"builderVersion":"5.0.0-public-beta.9.1"} /-->
<!-- wp:divi/accordion-item {"title":{"innerContent":{"desktop":{"value":"How do I change the animation trigger or timing?"}}},"content":{"innerContent":{"desktop":{"value":"Add companion attributes alongside \u003ccode\u003edata-theatre\u003c/code\u003e: \u003ccode\u003edata-theatre-trigger\u003c/code\u003e (onScroll, onLoad or onClick), \u003ccode\u003edata-theatre-delay\u003c/code\u003e in milliseconds, and \u003ccode\u003edata-theatre-duration\u003c/code\u003e to override a preset’s default speed."}}},"builderVersion":"5.0.0-public-beta.9.1"} /-->
